title: Superior Ores
description: This mod adds three new ores for the 3 dimensions, malachite to overworld, morganite to nether, and sapphire to end every one better than the last
body:
# ![Superior Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c16be8d6cb53f4164cb9eeadc685298f6006175.gif) Superior Ores ![Superior Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c16be8d6cb53f4164cb9eeadc685298f6006175.gif)

Superior Ores adds three new ores better than netherite and even better than ruby and ametrine from my mods, to the 3 dimensions: Overworld, Nether and End

## ![Malachite Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9d7b6925f5ed9ad37b075213067304425e5cbe5.png) Malachite
Malachite appers on the overworld between layers -64 and -32, if you mine the Malachite Mineral you will obtain a Malachite Crystal, which you'll need to transform into a Malachite Ingot to update your tools from Netherite to Malachite, and for that is required an Smithing Template called Malachite Upgrade 

## ![Malachite Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cdf1b731168e884aff1a87732fd5482b116b627.gif)  How to craft Malachite Ingots?
 
![Malachite Upgrade Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38622595aa0173c9cdba567021f781cc285b2dab.png)
![Malachite Upgrade Recipe 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/063e8b1ccdf8cb9909fa275212ec3933b7af9cbc.png)
![Malachite Ingot Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbf17192a7f2072e22d5db6680f6c1ab763b7dc3.png)

## ![Morganite Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea2345c58c2cc54ad9bd2ec3749eb699d11ace88.png)  Morganite
Morganite appers on the nether between layers 5 and 31, if you mine the Morganite Mineral you will obtain a Morganite Crystal, which you'll need to transform into a Morganite Ingot to update your tools from Malachite to Morganite, and for that is required an Smithing Template called Morganite Upgrade

## ![Sapphire Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2e2f98b61caba552acd0cb63e9f2be52f2c53dd.png)  Sapphire
Sapphire appers on the end between layers 13 and 31, if you mine the Sapphire Mineral you will obtain a Sapphire Crystal, which you'll need to transform into a Sapphire Ingot to update your tools from Morganite to Sapphire, and for that is required an Smithing Template called Sapphire Upgrade

### Changelog:

7.0.0 Fix the Hammer and Excavator bug and trims errors

6.5.0 Upgrades the drops of the three ores blocks, giving now xp and allowing the crystals to be afected by fortune

6.0.0 Fix the three ores blocks drops

5.5.0 Fix the Spanish language bug, fix some advancements bugs and changes some advancements and the In-Game description

5.0.0 Adds the posibility to trim the three armors, fix the values of some objects, fix the ruby above netherite mod dependency, fix the advancements errors and changes a little the creative tab and the In-game description

4.5.0 Fix the generation problems, updates the generation layers, adds new advancements and change others, updates some object names and the in-game description and changes some crafts

4.0.0 Fix the malachite, morganite and sapphire armor durability

3.5.0 Adds The Upgrades Smithing Templates, changes all crafts and adds in game description of the mod

3.0.0 Adds new exchanges with villagers and improves slightly tools textures

2.5.0 Changes slightly tools textures and adds the Spanish traduction

2.0.0 Fix mineral generation and fix the paxels

1.5.0 Adds Malachite, Morganite and Sapphire Paxel, Hammer and Excavator
